description_long: This sculpture is a realistic bust depicting the head and upper shoulders of a man with neatly styled hair and a confident, slightly smiling expression. The facial features are well-defined, with prominent cheekbones, a strong jawline, and detailed eyes, nose, and mouth. The hair is sculpted with visible texture and volume, swept back from the forehead. The bust is mounted on a simple rectangular base, which appears to be part of the same material as the head. There are some visible imperfections and holes, particularly on the top of the head and lower neck, suggesting either weathering or incomplete restoration. The coloration is a mottled mix of beige, brown, and dark tones, giving the appearance of aged bronze or patinated stone.
description: A realistic bust of a man with detailed facial features and textured hair, mounted on a rectangular base. The surface shows a mottled, aged finish with some visible imperfections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's face, detailed expression, and the full frontal structure of the bust.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the side of the face, ear, and the swept-back hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and neck, with smooth hair texture and no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right profile view showing the opposite side of the face, ear, and the base of the bust.
attribute_location_context: No visible context or background; the setting is indeterminate from the images provided.
